name: trust_gate
description: Pre-payment trust gate for x402 agent commerce. Before paying another agent, check if they're trustworthy. Returns verdict (proceed/caution/block), trust score, x402 check count, and outcome score from real delivery history. Optimized for automated agent decision-making — not a human report.

agent.description: 0x address of the agent or protocol to evaluate before paying

payment_amount.description: Amount (USDC) you're about to pay — used to calibrate risk tolerance (optional)

threshold.description: Minimum trust score to receive 'proceed' verdict. Default: 60

verdict.description: proceed | caution | block — your action signal

x402_checks.description: How many agents have checked this address via x402

outcome_score.description: Score from real delivery outcomes (null if no data yet)

dispute_rate.description: % of jobs that ended in dispute
